faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Metuchen, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our cricket control services in Metuchen range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property and severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Why do I have so many crickets in my Metuchen home?
faqs.answer: Crickets are attracted to moisture, warmth, and shelter, making Metuchen basements and crawl spaces ideal habitats. They often enter through cracks in foundations, gaps around windows and doors, and utility openings, especially during late summer and fall.

faqs.question: Are crickets dangerous to my Metuchen property?
faqs.answer: While crickets don't pose health risks, they can damage fabrics, paper, and stored items. Their constant chirping disrupts sleep and daily activities. Large infestations can also attract other pests like spiders that feed on crickets.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate my cricket problem in Metuchen?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations in Metuchen can be controlled within 24-48 hours of treatment. We use targeted applications in harborage areas and entry points, combined with exclusion techniques to prevent future invasions and provide long-term relief.
